violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Microwaves were not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezers were not cleaned as frequently as required.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Boxes of food under the freezer condenser were covered in ice.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the cappuccino machine in the customer area needs to be cleaned. The microwave in the customer area needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Pizza boxes need to be inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall behind the bag and box pop area needs to be cleaned.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light above the fryer, underneath the hood system needs a covering.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
